title: LAM TAWNTUNG A HONG PAIPIH HI

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,
Adang bang ka ngen nawn diam
Khan tawntung lam honghilh zo hi,
Hong itna ka muangkhial diam.
Amah muang leng leitung ah zong,
Vantung nopna pha ka nei.
(keitungah bang bang hong tung zong,
Zeisu'n a pha bawl ka thei)2

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,
Lam haksa hang lung nuamsak.
Ze-etna zawh na'ng hong hehpih,
Hin na Anlum in hong vak.
Ka kha tui duh dangtaakin vul,
Ka khe tawl puuk dek lai tak,
(Ka mai ah Suangpi pan hong phul,
En un lungdamna tui nak)2

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lam tawntung a hong paipih hi,
Kicing lamdang hong it na.
Tawl damna tak hong khamzohi,
Vantung ka Pa inn sungah
Sih nawn lohna puan bang silh in,
Ataang gam ka kai ding hi.
(Tua ciang sa ning atawn tungin,
Zeisu'n hong kha mualsuak hi)2
